scripts.typecheck:packages: pnpm run typecheck:package:config && pnpm run typecheck:package:shared-ui && pnpm run typecheck:package:asset-listings-ui && pnpm run typecheck:package:stores-core && pnpm run typecheck:package:asset-listings-state && pnpm run typecheck:package:lifecycle-core && pnpm run typecheck:package:lifecycle-web && pnpm run typecheck:package:lifecycle-wails
scripts.test:packages: pnpm run test:package:config && pnpm run test:package:shared-ui && pnpm run test:package:asset-listings-ui && pnpm run test:package:stores-core && pnpm run test:package:asset-listings-state && pnpm run test:package:lifecycle-core && pnpm run test:package:lifecycle-web && pnpm run test:package:lifecycle-wails
scripts.test:coverage:packages: pnpm run test:coverage:package:config && pnpm run test:coverage:package:shared-ui && pnpm run test:coverage:package:asset-listings-ui && pnpm run test:coverage:package:stores-core && pnpm run test:coverage:package:asset-listings-state && pnpm run test:coverage:package:lifecycle-core && pnpm run test:coverage:package:lifecycle-web && pnpm run test:coverage:package:lifecycle-wails
scripts.test: pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:website && pnpm run test:website-dev && pnpm run test:railyard
scripts.check:packages: pnpm run typecheck:packages && pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:coverage:packages
scripts.lint: pnpm run --dir website lint:fix && pnpm run --dir website-dev lint:fix && pnpm run --dir railyard/frontend lint:fix
scripts.format: pnpm run --dir website format && pnpm run --dir website-dev format && pnpm run --dir railyard/frontend format
scripts.ci: pnpm run --dir website ci && pnpm run --dir website-dev ci && pnpm run --dir railyard/frontend ci && pnpm run test
